overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a stealth video game showing a bald agent in a dark coat exploring an abandoned industrial facility at night. The character moves from an outdoor rooftop with cooling towers through graffiti-covered exterior corridors, subdues a guard, and enters a dimly lit warehouse interior covered in street art.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the industrial rooftop toward the cooling towers in the distance

entered.detail: two massive concrete cooling towers emitting steam against the stormy night sky
metal safety railing along the edge of the rooftop platform
concrete rooftop surface with metal drainage grates

segments.scene_description: The agent walks across an industrial rooftop at night with two large cooling towers visible in the distance against a stormy sky. The area is dimly lit with metal railings along the edges and a concrete surface underfoot.

agents.ego_description: walking along the exterior graffiti-covered wall, passing under bright industrial floodlights

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful street art, cartoon characters, and bubble letters
large metal exhaust pipes and ventilation ducts rising from the facility
bright industrial floodlights mounted on poles illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving along the exterior of the facility, the camera follows the agent past walls covered in vibrant graffiti and industrial piping. Bright floodlights illuminate sections of the path while storm clouds loom overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial building entrance with metal stairs

events.description: agent approaches and subdues a guard standing watch near the building entrance
character enters the warehouse interior through a metal doorway at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: sneaking up on a guard near the entrance, subduing them, and proceeding through the doorway

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the doorway holding a flashlight, unaware of the approaching agent

entered.detail: metal staircase with railings leading up to the building entrance
metal industrial door marked with graffiti tags serving as the entrance

segments.scene_description: The agent approaches a building entrance where a guard stands watch near metal stairs. After subduing the guard, the character ascends the stairs and enters the warehouse through a metal doorway, transitioning from exterior to interior.

agents.ego_description: moving through the large warehouse space, examining the graffiti-covered walls and industrial features

entered.detail: large multi-paned factory windows showing the stormy night sky outside
warehouse interior walls covered in elaborate colorful murals and street art
white porcelain bathtub sitting incongruously in the middle of the concrete floor
elevated metal walkway with safety railings along the upper level of the warehouse

segments.scene_description: Inside the abandoned warehouse, the agent explores a large open space with industrial windows, scattered debris, and extensive graffiti covering the walls. A bathtub sits incongruously in the middle of the concrete floor as the character moves deeper into the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stormy industrial rooftop into the depths of a graffiti-strewn warehouse. It begins with the agent traversing a concrete roof under a dark sky, with massive cooling towers looming in the distance. As the camera moves along the facility's exterior, the environment shifts toward vibrant, graffiti-covered walls and industrial piping illuminated by harsh floodlights. The scene then transitions through a building entrance where the agent subdues a guard and ascends metal stairs, moving from the open night air into a dimly lit interior. Finally, the camera expands into a large warehouse space filled with scattered debris and street art, passing an incongruous bathtub on the concrete floor as the agent ventures deeper inside.
